back_translation: For the choirmaster. Of David. For the memorial offering.
O God, deliver me; O LORD, hurry to help me.
May those who seek my life be put to shame and dishonored; may those who desire to harm me be turned back in disgrace.
May those who say, 'Aha, aha!' turn back because of their shame.
May all who seek You rejoice and be glad in You; may those who love Your salvation always say, 'Let God be magnified!'
But I am poor and needy; O God, hurry to me. You are my help and my deliverer; O LORD, do not delay.
